mapper.sql: id, user_name, head_icon, pass_word, qq, email,create_time, is_delete, is_enable
mapper.insert:
insert into user_info
id,
user_name,
head_icon,
pass_word,
create_time,
is_delete,
is_enable,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{headIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{passWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update user_info
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
head_icon = #{headIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pass_word = #{passWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user_info set user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, head_icon = #{headIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pass_word = #{passWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ppi.permission_name as systemName, ppi.permission_url as systemUrl FROM permission_info ppi LEFT JOIN role_permission prp ON ppi.id = prp.permission_id LEFT JOIN user_role pur ON prp.role_id = pur.role_id LEFT JOIN user_info pui ON pur.user_id = pui.id WHERE pui.user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update user_info
pass_word = #{passWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into user_info (id, user_name, pass_word, create_time, is_delete, is_enable ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.passWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
